title.en: All of a sudden, many extradimensional realms c...

content.en:
All of a sudden, many extradimensional realms came to visit Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian was only superficially received, and he didn't communicate much with these first realms.

And soon, he also established several super-dimensional realms of the second realm, and the existence of these second realms was not the super-dimensional realm of those big forces, but the ancestors of several super-dimensional families, one of which was the ancestor of the Tianyang family of the Extreme Yang Realm-the Lord of the Tianyang Realm.

At the beginning, he also took over the task of the Tianyang Family, and the Tianyang Realm Lord was hit hard at the beginning and almost fell, even so he has not recovered, at least he will not fall and die.

Although the Tianyang Realm Lord is said to be the second realm, this second realm is very poor, otherwise, the Tianyang family will not only have a few extradimensional realms.

If you are very rich, you can easily cultivate a lot of first realms, such as the Six-Winged Family, and a few second realms have cultivated dozens of first-realm extradimensional realms, but unfortunately the Six-Winged Family has been wiped out.

The Tianyang Realm Lord and the Tianyang Family are very poor, but it does not mean that the Tianyang Realm Lord is weak.

Almost all of the resources of the Heavenly Yang Realm Lord were used for his own cultivation, and he had been in the second realm for a long time, and his cultivation had reached the middle realm of the second realm, and the realm of superdimensional rules was definitely above a thousand superdimensional rules.

As for how many extra-dimensional rules he has comprehended, the Tianyang Realm Lord will not be exposed, and Ye Tian will not be able to ~ know.

In terms of cultivation, in the realm of extradimensional rules, Ye Tian is not as good as the Tianyang-Realm Master.

But in terms of physical strength, Ye Tian can be above it, after all, his talent is too high, resulting in a physical body that is too powerful, surpassing the physical body of the top superdimensional creatures of the same level.

Therefore, in terms of real combat effectiveness, Ye Tian may still be above it.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't show his strength.

this day.

Ye Tianlai asked the Tianyang Realm Lord.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, it is too difficult to comprehend the transcendental rules, and the progress is almost immovable, do you have a channel to obtain the treasures that assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I also want treasures to help comprehend extradimensional rules, but almost all of those items are controlled by powerful forces, and we can't get our hands on them at all. The Tianyang Realm Lord said helplessly.

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Tianyang Realm Lord said again: "Of course, it's not that you can't grasp the super-dimensional rules quickly, there is one place where you can accelerate the comprehension of the super-dimensional rules, and you are not controlled by those top extra-dimensional forces in the Six Thousand Territory." "

"Oh, where?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Red Dragon Yuan!" "The Heavenly Yang Realm Lord said, "This place is sleeping a superdimensional creature of the Third Realm cultivation, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, whose strength is said to have reached the limit of the Third Realm, unless the Fourth Realm descends, no Third Realm will dare to offend it." However, this Tricky Wood Red Dragon was almost asleep, and the Second Realm would not let it wake up in the past. But when it sleeps, the breath on its body forms a natural barrier, if you sacrifice some items, you can pass through the barrier, and enter there to comprehend a scale on the body of the Strange Wood Red Dragon, and many extradimensional rules will emerge on this scale, if you are enlightened, it will help to improve the extradimensional rules. Of course, there are certain dangers, such as once this Tricky Wood Red Dragon wakes up, then we will all be reduced to its snacks. But in a short time, it will certainly not wake up. "

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, Scales!"

Ye Tian was a little moved.

If you go to enlightenment, maybe you can greatly improve the extradimensional rules!

Of course, he also wanted to obtain a Extradimensional Dao Soldier similar to the Soul Pupil, so that he could comprehend the extradimensional rules faster.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, you have a superdimensional Dao soldier who can speed up the comprehension of the extradimensional rules, even if there are side effects, it doesn't matter. "

Ye Tian asked.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, what do you want that kind of treasure for, although it can speed up the comprehension of the transcendent rules, but it is almost at the cost of burning potential, once you use it, you will definitely not be able to impact the third realm in the future!" the Tianyang Realm Lord reminded.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, I have been injured before, and I have no hope of impacting the third realm, if there is that kind of treasure, I can improve the super dimensional rule realm and enhance my strength, it is also excellent. "

"I see!" The Tianyang Realm Lord showed a trace of regret, but when he thought of the transcendent realm of the second realm, nine out of nine had no hope of impacting the third realm, and he was hopeless, but there was no need to sympathize with Ye Tian.

0 begging for flowers

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, even if there is no hope for the third realm, but you can't use that kind of super dimensional dao soldier too much, otherwise the injury will be too serious, and the super dimensional dao kind will be too badly damaged, and it is almost impossible to reverse the injury, and the combat effectiveness will be greatly reduced. "

"I won't use it for long. "

Ye Tian explained. []

"In that case, I have one such extradimensional dao soldier on me. As he spoke, the Tianyang Realm Lord took out a crippled medium-dimensional super-dimensional dao soldier, which was shaped like a lotus platform, "This is what I accidentally obtained in a ruin, it is a crippled medium-dimensional super-dimensional dao soldier, its name is Yutian Lotus Table, it has the effect of defense and analysis of extra-dimensional rules, but it is already incomplete, and the defensive energy is almost useless, only the ability of analysis remains." However, urging it to parse extradimensional rules will come at a certain cost. It will erode the extradimensional body and the extradimensional Dao species, and it must not be used for one-tenth of its extradimensional epoch time, otherwise the injury will be so serious that it will not be able to maintain the combat power of the second realm. It's best to use one percent of the extradimensional epoch time, and then cultivate hundreds of extradimensional epochs before using it. "

"Tianyang Realm Lord, what is the price of this Yutian Lotus Terrace?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hey, it's useless to me, I'll sell it to you if I give it a hundred super dimensional dao coins!"

The Tianyang Realm Lord said casually.

One hundred super dimensional dao coins are indeed not worth much for a second realm, after all, this is a medium super dimensional dao soldier, and this price is very cost-effective.

If it is a real medium extra-dimensional weapon, it has no side effects, and even if it is an ordinary type, its value is in the thousands of extra-dimensional soldiers or even more.

Ye Tian took out a super-dimensional resource worth one hundred super-dimensional Dao coins, handed it to the Tianyang Realm Lord, and obtained this piece of Yutian Lotus Table.

After that, Ye Tian and the Tianyang Realm Lord discussed the matter of the Red Dragon Yuan again.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, are you still going to Chilong Yuan?" Ye Tian is planning to go, if the Tianyang Realm Lord also plans to go, they can go together.

"I'm not going!" the Tianyang Realm Lord shook his head, "My injuries haven't recovered yet, my combat strength is only one-tenth of usual, and the aura of the Strange Wood Red Dragon in the Red Dragon Yuan will cause more damage to my injuries, I don't dare to go over." "。
